post_install: try { Copy-Item (Join-Path $dir "sshenc-tpm-bridge.exe") -Destination (Join-Path $pd "sshenc-tpm-bridge.exe") -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "sshenc: bridge synced to $pd" } catch { Write-Warning "sshenc: failed to copy bridge to $pd ($_); WSL callers may pick up a stale bridge. If in use, stop sshenc-agent first (Stop-Process -Name sshenc-agent on Windows, pkill sshenc-agent in WSL). If permission denied, re-run scoop from an elevated shell, or set SSHENC_BRIDGE_PATH to the scoop path." }
